meta.title: Lan Read — Your first AI-powered reading companion
meta.description: Lan Read turns ePub/txt into a conversational mentor on iOS and iPadOS: instant summaries, skimming, ask-while-reading, Notion export, privacy-first local storage.

hero.title: Your first AI-powered reading companion
hero.subtitle: Import ePub or text, open to see AI summaries, skim chapters fast, and ask questions as you read. Local-first by default with Notion export.

vision: Let books talk with you. Read faster, understand deeper.

facts.label: Export
facts.value: Notion export for highlights and bookmarks

facts.label: Share Notes
facts.value: Share highlights and notes with teammates

features.title: Features

items.title: Local Book Import
items.body: Bring your own ePub or .txt from Files or local storage; keep your library local.

items.title: Instant AI Summaries
items.body: Open a book to see a concise overview and chapter structure with caching and manual refresh.

items.title: Skimming Mode
items.body: Chapter skeleton summaries with quick navigation for fast context building.

items.title: Ask While Reading
items.body: Ask about selected text, a chapter, or the whole book—explain, translate, or give examples; selection shortcuts are planned.

items.title: Reader Essentials
items.body: TOC, search, bookmarks, highlights, annotations, themes, adjustable fonts and line spacing, night mode.

items.title: Export & Notes
items.body: Export bookmarks and highlights to Notion when needed.

items.title: Share Knowledge Cards to Social Media
items.body: Share knowledge cards to social media platforms with one tap.

features.privacyNote: No required signup. Library stays local; secure key exchange and AI calls remain opt-in.

steps.title: Import
steps.body: Add ePub or text files from Files or local storage.

steps.title: Summarize
steps.body: Open a book to get the AI overview and chapter skeleton; results are cached for reuse.

steps.title: Read & Ask
steps.body: Highlight to ask, translate, or get examples while reading; selection shortcuts are planned.

steps.title: Export
steps.body: Export highlights/bookmarks to Notion when needed.

steps.title: Share
steps.body: Share note cards and annotated excerpts with teammates or friends.

privacy.title: Privacy
lines: Your library stays on your device by default, so you can start reading with peace of mind.
No sign-up is required to get started, and your reading experience is designed to feel simple and private.
We keep data collection to a minimum and focus only on what helps improve reliability and the overall experience.

footer.note: © 2026 Lan Read — Your first AI-powered reading companion.
